'''Fitz Roi''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jatz/Legends|jatz]] musician from the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]] who lived during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
Roi was famous because of his mastery with the [[Faln horn]] and the stage shows he managed. His career had been initially sponsored by a young female from [[House Barnaba]], who was infatuated with Roi, but later on Roi found success by himself.

Roi's family was native to [[Lenniera]], but Roi himself was a successful star often touring, and he only visited his family's home rarely, preferring his own home at [[Esseles/Legends|Esseles]]. Ever paranoid, Roi even leveled a plagiarism lawsuit at [[Acme Robopolish]], a [[Window/Legends|window]]-cleaning company, believing that their [[Droid/Legends|droids]] had stolen some of his songs.

He was deported from [[Rimma]] before he was to perform a concert due to his discharging of his pistols while in the [[Crystal Room]] of [[Teirra Parko]]. His fans rioted and caused several hundred thousands of [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] damage to the city of [[Recardeon]].<ref name="AJ3">{{JournalCite|3|Galaxywide NewsNets}}</ref>

Roi had two [[Slugthrower/Legends|slugthrowers]] stolen from him by the thief known as [[Tanda Marelle|Tombat]]. The slugthrowers were relics from the [[Manderon Period]], and had been crafted, if rumors were to be believed, by legendary artisan [[Andel Tanner]]. Roi usually shot his guns off during the concert.<ref name="AJ4">{{JournalCite|4|Galaxywide NewsNets}}</ref>

After Roi's [[Summerside Tour]] was canceled, he chose to play at the [[Priole Danna Festival]], a planetary event from [[Lamuir IV]]. During his play, his guns were stolen by the same Tombat who owned them in the first place. Due to his guns, his sponsor, [[Flangth-2-Go]], eventually pulled their support with him.<ref name="AJ4" />

While performing at the [[Arcopola Baas Music Festival]] in [[Greccia]], Roi debuted his new song ''[[Tymin' Downband]]''. It was his first public appearance since the Priole Danna Festival two [[Standard year/Legends|years]] earlier. He also announced he would start a new tour, beginning on the planet [[Gambolla]].<ref name="AJ11">{{JournalCite|11|Galaxywide NewsNets}}</ref>

Later on, during a concert on Esseles, Roi was known because he went on stage dressed as a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]].
